prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Overcurrent device selection & coordination, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: breaker/conductor ampacity mismatch. The work is through its testing or inspection step. Reference material on hand: NEC 240, 210.8, 210.12, 110.14(C) termination temp ratings. A drawing, inspection checklist, equipment tag, or manufacturer instruction is available for comparison.
title: Document check: Overcurrent device selection & coordination (residential job)
